ground_truth.title: Top 17 Social Media Marketing Agencies in the U.S. (2025)
ground_truth.author: Jack Shepherd
ground_truth.main_content: In this post, you'll see a breakdown of the best social media marketing agencies in the U.S that specialize in Social Content, Social Media Management, Social Creative, Paid Social Advertising, Influencer Marketing, and more. The Social Shepherd is regarded as one of the leading Social Media Marketing agencies in the United States, and worldwide, working with some of the fastest-growing, and household-name brands. Faceplant is a creatively-led social agency hailing from Austin, Texas, with a knack for representing top-tier brands like Netflix, San Pellegrino, IHG Hotels & Resorts, iFly, and Swish Dental. We Are Social is a global socially-led creative agency rooted in New York City and Los Angeles with 19 global offices and over 1300 professionals. Inbeat is a global agency with a prominent presence in major cities like New York City, Los Angeles, Montreal, Toronto, Singapore, Paris, Miami, and London, focusing on Creators and TikTok. The Shelf is a leading full-service social influencer marketing agency equipped with a proprietary SaaS platform of its own. Movement Strategy is a prominent social media management agency with a distinguished clientele that includes Klarna, Under Armour, and Prime Video. Zipline specializes in B2B social media marketing across LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more. In today's digital landscape, you need a top social media marketing agency to bring your brand into the social-first world we live in. 77% of businesses use social media to reach customers.
with: You're looking for a Social Media marketing agency in the United States, but you don't know where to start?
